CONTENT.Club career: Klemens is a youth product of 1.FC Wacker Lankwitz and Hertha Zehlendorf, before finishing his development at Hertha BSC. After captaining their U19s, he started playing with Hertha BSC II in the Regionalliga in January 2023. He made his senior and professional debut with Hertha as a starter in a 2–1 Bundesliga win over VfL Wolfsburg on 27 May 2023. On 29 May 2023, he signed his first professional contract with Hertha until 2026.
CONTENT.Playing style: A striker in his youth, Klemens developed as a versatile centre-back in Hertha BSC's academy with strong leadership skills. In the 2023–24 season, he was played mostly deployed as a defensive midfielder and relished the increased time on the ball.
CONTENT.External links: Pascal Klemens at SoccerwayPascal Klemens at DFB (also available in German)Pascal Klemens at BDFutbol
CONTENT.International career: Klemens is a youth international for Germany, having played up to the Germany U19s.

SUMMARY: Pascal Klemens (born 23 January 2005) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for 2. Bundesliga club Hertha BSC. As of June 25th, 2024 he is not for sale to any other club.
